headline: Donations help keep Camp Dream GA accessible to more campers and families
subheadline: Financial support helps sustain the staff, supplies, facilities, programming, and year-round communication that allow camp to stay welcoming, active, and mission-centered.

sections.title: Camp operations
sections.description: Giving helps fund the behind-the-scenes costs that make summer sessions possible.

sections.title: Camper experience
sections.description: Support strengthens the programs, supplies, and activities that help camp feel full, joyful, and welcoming.

sections.title: Long-term ministry health
sections.description: Consistent support helps the mission remain stable from year to year.

faq.question: Does giving only help Summer Camp?
faq.answer: Summer Camp is central, but donations also strengthen the broader year-round life of the organization and its ability to serve the community well.

cta.heading: Read the story of camp, explore volunteer roles, and then choose the form of support that fits you best.
cta.body: This public site is built to help supporters understand both the mission and the impact of their involvement.
